negative_variants.description: File Fopen Mode Selector: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
File Fopen Mode Selector: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
File Fopen Mode Selector: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
File Fopen Mode Selector: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
File Fopen Mode Selector: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
